channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Auburn, Alabama, Florida headline SEC's haul in the NCAA selection committee's early top-16 seeds
item.description: Auburn has spent the past month ranked as the nation's best team in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll. The committee that will choose the 68-team field for the NCAA Tournament is just as high on the Tigers. And the Southeastern Conference, for that matter.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah Warriors kick off 2025 season next week
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - About to begin its eighth season in Major League Rugby, the Utah Warriors are out to improve upon last year's 5-11 record. "I think we do really well this year," said fullback Sione Mahe.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Funeral service held for Virginia McCaskey
item.description: A private funeral service will be held for Virginia Halas McCaskey, the 102-year-old owner of the Chicago Bears, after a public memorial service held in Des Plaines on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Winnie Dortch, WGN 9

item.title: NBA All-Star 2025 tip-off party canceled due to weather
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The official NBA All-Star 2025 tip-off party, which was set to take place Thursday at Thrive City has been canceled due to weather. The event was due to take place between 5 p.m. and 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Lakers blow past Jazz in Doncic debut, 132-113
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz were no match for the Lakers in the much-anticipated debut of Luka Doncic. Doncic had 14 points, five rebounds and four assists in his Lakers debut as Los Angeles beat the Utah Jazz 132-113 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Super Bowl losers get this ring instead
item.description: What about the losers? They also get a ring – though not one to commemorate their presence at the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Did you know? The flag presented during the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX came from Utah
item.description: The flag presented during the performance of the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX was handmade by a Utah-based flag company.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: A presidential first: Trump at the Super Bowl, latest chapter in a complicated legacy with football
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — As a student, Donald Trump played high school football. As a business baron, he owned a team in an upstart rival to the NFL and then sued the established league. As president, he denigrated pros who took a knee during the national anthem as part of a social justice movement.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: What's at stake, who's announcing, who's performing and what time does it start? Everything to know
item.description: Sean Lewis and Jewell Hillery talked with Rod Carter, live from New Orleans for The Big Game, on Sunday's WGN Weekend Morning News. See the attached video player to watch. Super Bowl Sunday weekend has arrived.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
